items.name: Golden Rose Bow Hair
items.description:
Shine with elegance wearing the Golden Rose Bow Hair, a limited Roblox UGC that combines soft golden waves with a delicate rose-colored satin bow. Perfect for aesthetic, royal, or cottagecore outfits, this hairstyle brings a touch of luxury and sweetness to any look. A must-have for collectors and fashion-forward players.

Tags:
#Hair #BowHair #BlondeHair #GoldenHair #LimitedUGC #RobloxUGC #Aesthetic #Cute #Royal #Cottagecore #Elegant #SatinBow #Luxury #CollectorItem
